accommodations.text: Permit brief movement breaks between tasks.
State task expectations explicitly and in writing.
accommodations.source_quote: state task expectations explicitly and in writing

accommodations.text: Break multi-step directions into chunked, numbered steps.
accommodations.source_quote: break multi-step directions into numbered steps

accommodations.text: Provide a peer notetaker or copy of lecture notes.
accommodations.source_quote: peer notetaker or copy of lecture notes

accommodations.text: Check the daily planner for recorded homework before dismissal.
accommodations.source_quote: check the daily planner before dismissal

accommodations.text: Provide a checklist to break long assignments into steps.
accommodations.source_quote: checklist to break long assignments into steps

accommodations.text: Do not penalize articulation errors in graded oral work.
accommodations.source_quote: do not penalize articulation errors in graded oral work

accommodations.text: Seat near the point of instruction and away from high-traffic areas.
accommodations.source_quote: preferential seating near the point of instruction

services.source_quote: Speech and language therapy social communication 30 minutes weekly

goals.text: Marcus will use a taught script to join a peer activity in 3 of 4 structured opportunities.
goals.baseline: Joins a peer activity with adult prompting in 1 of 4 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: use a taught script to join a peer activity

goals.text: Noah will use a self-monitoring checklist to review work before submitting in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Reviews work before submitting in 1 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: use a self-monitoring checklist to review work before submitting

goals.text: Jamal will answer inferential questions about a text with 80% accuracy.
goals.source_quote: answer inferential questions about a text with 80% accuracy

goals.text: Oscar will use a checklist to organize materials for each class in 8 of 10 days.
goals.source_quote: use a checklist to organize materials for each class
